lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਧਨਵੰਤ ਹੈਨਿ ਨਿਰਧਨੁ ਹੋਰੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate se dhanavant hain niradhan hor sansaar |26|
lines.english: O Nanak, they alone are wealthy, who are imbued with the Naam; the rest of the world is poor. ||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕੀ ਟੇਕ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਠਵਰ ਨ ਠਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jan kee ttek har naam har bin naavai tthavar na tthaau |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is the Support of the Lord's humble servants. Without the Lord's Name, the there is no other place, no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਲਾਗਾ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaagee naam dhiaaeaa ahinis laagaa bhaau |
lines.english: Those with great good fortune meditate on the Naam; night and day, they embrace love for the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਨਾਉ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee naau man vasai sahaje sehaj samaau |
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, the Name abides in the mind, and one is intuitively, automatically absorbed in the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਮੰਗੈ ਧੂੜਿ ਤਿਨ ਹਉ ਸਦ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੈ ਜਾਉ ॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: jan naanak mangai dhoorr tin hau sad kurabaanai jaau |27|
lines.english: Servant Nanak begs for the dust of their feet; I am forever a sacrifice to them. ||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਸਭੁ ਪਸਰਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ਚਲੈ ਨ ਅੰਤੀ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: eihu mohu maaeaa sabh pasariaa naal chalai na antee vaar |
lines.english: All this show of emotional attachment to Maya shall not go with you at that very last instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਮੇਦਨੀ ਤਿਸਨਾ ਜਲਤੀ ਕਰੇ ਪੁਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh medanee tisanaa jalatee kare pukaar |
lines.english: The 8.4 million species of beings burn in desire and cry in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਬੂਝਿਆ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਬਿਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaagee satigur paaeaa boojhiaa braham bichaar |
lines.english: By great good fortune, one meets the True Guru, and comes to understand the contemplation of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਕਿਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਕਰੀ ਪੁਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: bin har saant na aavee kis aagai karee pukaar |
lines.english: Without the Lord, peace and tranquility do not come; unto whom should we go and complain?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਨਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਸਭ ਬੁਝਿ ਗਈ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: tisanaa agan sabh bujh gee jan naanak har ur dhaar |28|
lines.english: The fire of desire is totally extinguished, O servant Nanak, enshrining the Lord within the heart. ||28||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸੀ ਖਤੇ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: asee khate bahut kamaavade ant na paaraavaar |
lines.english: I make so many mistakes, there is no end or limit to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਲੇਖੈ ਵਾਰ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਤੂੰ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo lekhai vaar na aavee toon bakhas milaavanahaar |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, if You made an account of my mistakes, my turn to be forgiven would not even come. Please forgive me, and unite me with Yourself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਬਖਸਿ ਲੈਹੁ ਹਉ ਪਾਪੀ ਵਡ ਗੁਨਹਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har kirapaa kar kai bakhas laihu hau paapee vadd gunahagaar |
lines.english: O Lord, please be merciful and forgive me; I am a sinner, a great offender.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੁਠੈ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਲਿਆ ਸਭ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਕਟਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: gur tutthai har prabh meliaa sabh kilavikh katt vikaar |
lines.english: The Guru, in His Pleasure, has united me with the Lord God; He has cut away all my sinful mistakes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਜੋ ਮਿਲੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਭੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: vichhurr vichhurr jo mile satigur ke bhai bhaae |
lines.english: Those who have been separated and alienated from the Lord are united with Him again, through the Fear and the Love of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨੑ ਜੈਕਾਰੁ ॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: jinaa har har naam dhiaaeaa jan naanak tina jaikaar |29|
lines.english: Servant Nanak celebrates the victory of those who meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਭਏ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran nihachal bhe guramukh naam dhiaae |
lines.english: They escape the cycle of birth and death, and, as Gurmukh, they meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਹੀਰੇ ਰਤਨ ਲਭੰਨੑਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur saadhoo sangat milai heere ratan labhana |
lines.english: Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Guru's Congregation, the diamonds and jewels are obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਲਾਲੁ ਅਮੋਲਕਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਖੋਜਿ ਲਹੰਨੑਿ ॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: naanak laal amolakaa guramukh khoj lahana |30|
lines.english: O Nanak, the jewel is priceless; the Gurmukhs seek and find it. ||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਚੇਤਿਓ ਧਿਗੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਧਿਗੁ ਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh naam na chetio dhig jeevan dhig vaas |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do not even think of the Naam. Cursed are their lives, and cursed are their homes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਭੇਦਿਓ ਕਿਉ ਹੋਵੈ ਘਰ ਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man sabad na bhedio kiau hovai ghar vaas |
lines.english: This mind is not pierced by the Word of the Shabad; how can it come to dwell in its true home?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਦਾ ਦਿਤਾ ਖਾਣਾ ਪੈਨਣਾ ਸੋ ਮਨਿ ਨ ਵਸਿਓ ਗੁਣਤਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis daa ditaa khaanaa painanaa so man na vasio gunataas |
lines.english: That Lord who gives them so much to eat and wear - they do not enshrine that Lord, the Treasure of Virtue, in their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਹਾਗੁ ਹੈ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਮਣੀ ਲਿਖਿਆਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam suhaag hai masatak manee likhiaas |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs are embellished and exalted by the Naam, the Name of the Lord; the jewel of destiny is engraved upon their foreheads.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੀਆ ਦੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਿ ਮੁਈਆਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: manamukheea dohaaganee aavan jaan mueeaas |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are like discarded brides, ruined by coming and going in the cycle of reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਕਮਲ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam ur dhaariaa har hiradai kamal pragaas |
lines.english: They enshrine the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, within their hearts; the Lord illumines their heart-lotus.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਹਉ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਤਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sevan aapanaa hau sad balihaaree taas |
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to those who serve their True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਮੁਖ ਉਜਲੇ ਜਿਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: naanak tin mukh ujale jin antar naam pragaas |31|
lines.english: O Nanak, radiant and bright are the faces of those whose inner beings are illuminated with the Light of the Naam. ||31||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੇਖ ਕਰਹਿ ਬਹੁ ਕਰਮ ਵਿਗੁਤੇ ਭਾਇ ਦੂਜੈ ਪਰਜ ਵਿਗੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bhekh kareh bahu karam vigute bhaae doojai paraj vigoee |
lines.english: They wear religious robes and perform all sorts of rituals, but they are ruined; in the love of duality, their world is ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰੈ ਸੋਈ ਜਨੁ ਸਿਝੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: sabad marai soee jan sijhai bin sabadai mukat na hoee |
lines.english: Those who die in the Word of the Shabad are saved. Without the Shabad, no one is liberated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨਾਉ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਜੇ ਸਉ ਲੋਚੈ ਕੋਈ ॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: naanak bin satigur naau na paaeeai je sau lochai koee |32|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the True Guru, the Name is not obtained, even though one may long for it hundreds of times. ||32||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਉ ਅਤਿ ਵਡ ਊਚਾ ਊਚੀ ਹੂ ਊਚਾ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naau at vadd aoochaa aoochee hoo aoochaa hoee |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is utterly great, lofty and high, the highest of the high.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਖਿ ਸੰਜਮ ਹਛਾ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਕਰਿ ਭੇਖ ਭਵੈ ਸਭ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: mukh sanjam hachhaa na hovee kar bhekh bhavai sabh koee |
lines.english: Speaking about self-discipline, no one become pure; everyone walks around wearing religious robes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪੜਿ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਸਕਈ ਜੇ ਸਉ ਲੋਚੈ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aparr koe na sakee je sau lochai koee |
lines.english: No one can climb up to it, even though one may long for it, hundreds of times.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਆਇ ਵਸੈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: antar aae vasai gurasabad veechaarai koe |
lines.english: The Lord comes and dwells within that one who contemplates the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਪਉੜੀ ਜਾਇ ਚੜੈ ਕਰਮਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee paurree jaae charrai karam paraapat hoee |
lines.english: Those blessed by the karma of good deeds go and climb the ladder of the Guru.
